title: Grilled German Pork Sausage with Sauteed Onions
description: A classic German-inspired dish featuring juicy pork sausage grilled to perfection. Served with caramelized onions and a hint of smoky flavor.
instructions: Slice the onions thinly and separate into rings.
Season the pork sausage with salt and pepper.
Grill the sausage for 5-7 minutes per side, or until browned and cooked through.
While the sausage is cooking, sauté the onions in light beer until caramelized.
Add the thyme sprigs to the onions during the last minute of cooking.
Serve the grilled sausage with sautéed onions and a side of your choice.
Optional: serve with a side of braised red cabbage or potato salad.
